testcase.name: test_checkout_premium_plan
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_admin_pesapal.py:177: in test_checkout_premium_plan assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 502: {"detail":"PesaPal error: Problem: parameter_rejected | Advice: invalid_value_amount_exceeds_limit> oauth_parameters_rejected | 19999"} E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_checkout_enterprise_plan
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_admin_pesapal.py:194: in test_checkout_enterprise_plan assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 502: {"detail":"PesaPal error: Problem: parameter_rejected | Advice: invalid_value_amount_exceeds_limit> oauth_parameters_rejected | 29999"} E assert 502 == 200 E + where 502 = <Response [502]>.status_code
